mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND gender = #{gender}
AND department LIKE CONCAT('%', #{department}, '%')
AND position LIKE CONCAT('%', #{position}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee (name, gender, department, position, entry_date, last_operation_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{gender}, #{department}, #{position}, #{entryDate}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE employee SET name = #{employee.name}, gender = #{employee.gender}, department = #{employee.department}, position = #{employee.position}, entry_date = #{employee.entryDate}, last_operation_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
